signal_evidence.services_demand: Net deposits remain strong in what is typically a seasonally slow quarter, they were $4 billion in Q3, which translates to an 18% annual growth rate.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: We plan to make some targeted growth investments in marketing and product launches, including for the UK, Futures and Credit Card... Q4 adjusted OpEx in the range of $375 million to $395 million.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Most of our competitors are charging $0.65 per contract for typical trades... our pricing advantage is strong and continuing to drive value for us.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We believe we have a good shot of delivering record annual revenue in 2023. And our adjusted EBITDA this year is on track to be roughly three times our prior record.
